name: chaud-test
description: stresse au maximum le back, le front et la base de données

scripts.mix:wa: cross-env PROVIDER=mix MIXED_PROVIDERS=whapi,meta node --loader ts-node/esm index.ts
scripts.status:meta: cross-env MODE=status PROVIDER=meta node --loader ts-node/esm index.ts
scripts.status:messenger: cross-env MODE=status PROVIDER=messenger node --loader ts-node/esm index.ts
scripts.status:instagram: cross-env MODE=status PROVIDER=instagram node --loader ts-node/esm index.ts
scripts.rich:whapi: cross-env MODE=mix PROVIDER=whapi node --loader ts-node/esm index.ts
scripts.rich:telegram: cross-env MODE=mix PROVIDER=telegram node --loader ts-node/esm index.ts
scripts.rich:all: cross-env MODE=mix PROVIDER=mix MIXED_PROVIDERS=whapi,meta,messenger,instagram,telegram node --loader ts-node/esm index.ts
